title: Future Trends & Predictions
description: Jak mluvit o budoucnosti, trendech a predikcích — od jistoty po spekulaci.
notes: ✓ Certain: 'will', 'is going to', 'is bound to', 'is certain to'
✓ Unlikely: 'is unlikely to', 'I doubt that', 'probably won't'

examples.en: AI is likely to automate many routine jobs within the next decade.
examples.cz: AI pravděpodobně automatizuje mnoho rutinních pracovních míst v příštím desetiletí.

examples.en: It is predicted that global temperatures will rise by 2°C by 2050.
examples.cz: Předpovídá se, že globální teploty do roku 2050 vzrostou o 2 °C.

examples.en: Electric vehicles are bound to become the standard within 20 years.
examples.cz: Elektrická vozidla se jistě stanou standardem do 20 let.

examples.en: There is a chance that fusion energy could solve the climate crisis.
examples.cz: Existuje šance, že fúzní energie by mohla vyřešit klimatickou krizi.

quiz.sentence: This technology is ___ to replace traditional methods. (certain)
Experts ___ that demand will double by 2030.
Remote work is ___ to remain common. (probable)
Many jobs that exist today will become ___ by 2040.

tasks: 1. Write 5 predictions about your own field/industry in 10 years
2. Write a paragraph about a trend you find most interesting or worrying
3. Compare two scenarios for the future of cities: optimistic vs pessimistic
